summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements with good coverage. REQ-1 (design status radio replacing file upload), REQ-2 (admin login redirect), REQ-3 (UX improvements, hero, share button, sponsor badge), REQ-4 (language toggle), and REQ-5 (branding) are largely addressed. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: the QuotationRequestPage.tsx itself is not shown in the diff so the actual form change cannot be confirmed, some customer-facing pages are not shown as modified, and the required badge image asset is not referenced.

missing_requirements.requirement: QuotationRequestPage.tsx must remove file attachment input and replace with 'Is your design ready?' radio/toggle — the actual QuotationRequestPage.tsx file is not present in the diff, so the form-level changes cannot be confirmed.
missing_requirements.reason: QuotationRequestPage.tsx is not listed among the modified files in the diff. Without it, the core REQ-1 UI change (removing file upload, adding radio buttons) cannot be verified.

missing_requirements.requirement: All customer-facing pages including ServicesPage, TestimonialsPage, and CustomerRegistrationPage must use translations from LanguageContext and display correctly in both languages.
missing_requirements.reason: ServicesPage.tsx, TestimonialsPage.tsx, and CustomerRegistrationPage.tsx are not listed among the modified files, so full bilingual coverage on those pages cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add smooth hover and tap animations to service cards on ServicesPage.
missing_requirements.reason: ServicesPage.tsx is not in the modified files list, so hover/tap animations on service cards on that page cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Images required: 'Sponsored by Magic Advertising' footer badge image (magic-advertising-badge.dim_320x64.png) should be used as specified in the build request.
missing_requirements.reason: The footer in Layout.tsx uses text-based branding rather than the specified badge image asset magic-advertising-badge.dim_320x64.png, which is never referenced in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added as a new file to handle data migration from OldQuotationRequest to NewQuotationRequest.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request any backend migration module. The constraint states all Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo single actor, and the non-goals explicitly exclude adding new backend services.

hallucinated_features.description: Admin password 'Munnu1998@' is hardcoded as a plaintext constant in AdminLoginPage.tsx.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request did not request hardcoding of admin credentials in the frontend source code. No requirement mentions storing plaintext passwords in client-side code.
